audience_policies.source_phrase: THIS IS A COUPON PASS Zoo New England Pass admits 6 people to either Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo. With this coupon adult admission is reduced to $9.00 and child admission to $6.00 Children under 2 are free. Please check the website for hours of operation and closures. http
